parameters.command: =mkdir -p /home/ubuntu/EasyWayDataPortal/agents/logs && echo '{{ JSON.stringify({ts: $json.scanTimestamp, branch: $json.gitBranch, sha: $json.gitSha, critical: $json.critical, high: $json.high, total: $json.totalFindings, compliant: $json.compliantScripts, violations: $json.nonCompliantScripts}) }}' >> /home/ubuntu/EasyWayDataPortal/agents/logs/sentinel-scan.jsonl

parameters.responseBody: ={ "status": "ok", "critical": {{ $('Parse Scan Result').first().json.critical }}, "high": {{ $('Parse Scan Result').first().json.high }}, "totalFindings": {{ $('Parse Scan Result').first().json.totalFindings }}, "filesScanned": {{ $('Parse Scan Result').first().json.filesScanned }} }

meta.description: Nightly secrets scan + on-demand webhook. Runs Invoke-SecretsScan.ps1, logs results, creates ADO Task on CRITICAL findings.
